products.name: PROFIT Signature Hoodie
products.description: Our flagship heavyweight hoodie designed for ultimate comfort and presence. Crafted from 450GSM organic cotton with a structured fit.

products.name: PROFIT Essential Tee
products.description: The foundation of every urban wardrobe. A mid-weight, boxy fit tee with reinforced collar and refined stitching.

products.name: PROFIT Shadow Sneakers
products.description: Minimalist silhouette meets futuristic cushioning. All-black design with technical mesh and premium leather accents.

products.name: PROFIT Cargo Pant (Dark)
products.description: Functional aesthetics for the modern explorer. Featuring utility pockets, adjustable hems, and water-resistant fabric.

products.name: PROFIT Tech Beanie
products.description: Soft, breathable knit with a minimalist PROFIT logo. Designed to retain shape and provide subtle urban warmth.

products.name: PROFIT Heavyweight Crew
products.description: Oversized, structural crewneck that maintains a sharp profile. Perfect for layering in the Modern Noir aesthetic.

reviews.comment: Exceptional quality. The weight of the fabric is just right.
